prompt: Create a warm, cinematic macro still life of an old fairy-tale illustration coming alive on a sheet of rough handmade parchment lying on a dark wooden desk. A human hand holds an antique fountain pen at the upper right, the nib touching the paper and releasing glossy dark blue ink that becomes a winding miniature river across the page. The river snakes from the pen nib through the center and foreground, sparkling with tiny star-like flecks, bordered by raised pebbles, moss, tiny flowers, and miniature rocky banks as if the drawing has become a 3D diorama. Include exactly 6 main story elements: 1 antique fountain pen held by fingers, 1 winding ink river, 1 small boy in dark clothes walking beside the river, 1 small light-colored dog walking with him, 1 twisted old tree with sparse blue-black foliage on the left, 1 glass bell jar containing a single red rose on the right. Add exactly 1 small wooden toy airplane near the lower right bank. At the upper left of the parchment, write exactly 2 lines of elegant cursive ink text: line 1, “draw me a dream...”; line 2, “It is only with the heart...”. The scene should feel like a miniature world from an old storybook, inspired by poetic childhood adventure, pen-and-ink illustration, and magical realism. Use a shallow depth of field, warm amber lighting, dark vignetted background, highly detailed paper fibers, wet ink reflections, realistic macro photography texture, and painterly handcrafted details. Keep the composition vertical, with the parchment filling most of the frame, the pen entering from the top right, the handwritten text at upper left, and the boy and dog placed in the lower-left-middle area beside the river. Do not add extra characters, extra animals, modern objects, logos, or additional readable text.
